actions.text: ## Key Decisions and Agreements

actions.text: **Panel webinar scheduled for October 28, 1pm EST** - Title: "Chasing Waterfalls: Navigating the Future of Career Readiness" with full promotional push starting immediately
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Rationale: Less than 2 weeks to event requires aggressive social media strategy across all partner channels
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Why it matters: Webinar will position Careerspan + Magic EdTech as thought leaders in continuous learning/career readiness space
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Marketing strategy finalized with channel-specific responsibilities** - Magic EdTech handles company channels (LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X) + internal magician posts; Careerspan handles LinkedIn + user email push + Slack communities; Lisa Noble promotes through NESCAC network (88,000 students across 11 colleges) + national career advisor networks + entrepreneurship educator networks
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Rationale: Leveraging each partner's existing audience reach maximizes registration potential
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Why it matters: Combined reach spans K-12, higher ed, EdTech, career tech ecosystems - broad target for career readiness topic
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Individual promotional graphics being produced for all panelists** - Square social posts with individual headshots + webinar details ready by tomorrow for personal LinkedIn promotion
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Rationale: Personal promotion from panelists typically drives higher engagement than company posts
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Why it matters: Creates VIP positioning for panelists, increases likelihood of shares/engagement

actions.text: Rationale: Extends shelf life of content beyond live event
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Panel structure clarified with Olivia as moderator** - Conversational format with targeted opening questions to specific panelists, then opening to group discussion; closing with lightning round question for all panelists
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Rationale: Balances individual expertise showcase with group conversation flow
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Why it matters: Olivia acknowledged this is new format for her (more podcasts than panels), so structure reduces risk of unbalanced airtime
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Language refinement agreed upon for panel topics** - "Career services to career readiness ecosystems" clarified to mean moving from job boards (handshake) to experiential learning/apprenticeships
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Rationale: Lisa Noble flagged potential to alienate career services professionals if language suggests they're not addressing career readiness
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Why it matters: Ensures panel doesn't create defensiveness in target audience, maintains friend-not-foe positioning with higher ed
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Strategic Context
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: This is a coordination meeting for an upcoming public webinar panel that positions Careerspan and Magic EdTech as aligned partners in the career readiness/continuous learning space. The event targets a broad audience: educators (K-12 and higher ed), EdTech leaders, workforce development leaders, hiring managers, and early talent development professionals.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Key positioning themes emerging:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Anti-establishment alignment**: Multiple references to shared "enemies" - Workday, LinkedIn, Handshake - positions Careerspan + Magic as challenger brands serving underserved niches
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Hot take calibration**: Lisa Noble's instinct to moderate strong critiques of career services shows strategic awareness of not alienating potential partners/customers
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Growth goal awareness**: Lisa explicitly asked about sales strategy vis-a-vis higher ed ("frenemy, enemy?"), signaling sensitivity to how positioning affects partnership potential
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Network leverage**: Lisa's offer to promote through NESCAC (88K students) + national career advisor networks + hiring manager networks from consulting background represents significant reach amplification
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Pain points surfaced:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Lisa Noble needs title clarification for promotional materials (Deputy Director of Halloran Lab for Entrepreneurship doesn't signal career expertise)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Career services offices often hamstrung by "varying levels of autonomy and funding" despite good intentions (Vrijen insight from selling to that segment)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Panel format presents risk of unbalanced airtime (Olivia's concern about moderating multiple voices)
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Competitive landscape notes:**
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Clear anti-LinkedIn, anti-Handshake, anti-Workday positioning
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Framing as "career readiness ecosystems" vs traditional job boards/ATS platforms
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Emphasis on continuous learning, experiential learning, apprenticeships over transactional job matching
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window
